insights: Top results dominated by AKC.org (domain authority), BetterVet, PreventiveVet - all established vet/breed sites
Most top-10 pages focus on 'puppy vaccine schedule' with detailed age-week tables
PupVax has more interactive tools (schedule tracker) but lower domain authority
Opportunity: target long-tail 'puppy vaccine schedule by age 6-16 weeks' where the interactive tracker differentiates
PupVax's deworming schedule page is unique - few top-10 competitors cover deworming in detail
